description.value:
Frequency once per day

Your core pierces into the void and creates a black hole that tears apart the souls of everyone around you. All creatures within a @Template[emanation|distance:10] take @Damage[8d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage with a basic @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:area-effect] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. A creature that fails this save is also pulled 5 feet toward you (or pulled 10 feet toward you and knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone] on a critical failure). For 1 minute, any creature that ends its turn within a @Template[emanation|distance:10] around you takes @Damage[5d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage (basic Fortitude save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC).

If you aren't glitching, you can choose to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Glitching]{Glitching 1} when you use Synthesized Black Hole to increase the radius of the emanation from 10 feet to @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet}. You can't reduce your glitching value for as long as Synthesized Black Hole is in effect, but you can Dismiss the effect.
